overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in traditional white robes ascending a mountain temple at night. The scene features traditional East Asian architecture with red pillars, hanging lanterns, and cherry blossoms under a moonlit sky, with the character climbing stone stairs through various temple structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor temple stairs with cherry blossoms

events.description: moonlight becomes more prominent as character ascends higher
character approaches and enters the main red temple gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up wide stone stairs toward the illuminated temple gate

notable_agents.action: figure in yellow robes descending the stairs toward the character

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with wooden railings on both sides
large traditional gate with curved roof and red pillars
trees with white blossoms on the hillside
vertical strings of warm yellow lanterns illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends an outdoor stone staircase at night, flanked by cherry blossom trees and illuminated by hanging lanterns. A figure in yellow robes descends the stairs as the character approaches a large red temple gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway under temple gate structure

events.description: passing through the main gate into the covered interior stairway
character continues ascending steeper stairs under the roofed structure

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs through the covered gate structure with red pillars

entered.detail: roofed stairway with red support pillars and overhead structure
temple walls with dark wooden trim

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the main gate into a covered stairway supported by red pillars. The environment shifts from open moonlit exterior to a lantern-lit interior passage with white plaster walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered temple corridor with red pillars

events.description: passing close to large bright lanterns hanging from the corridor ceiling
approaching the open platform area at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered corridor with red pillars and white walls

entered.detail: long corridor with evenly spaced red pillars and overhead roof
large round paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow covered corridor lined with red pillars and illuminated by large round paper lanterns. The path continues past white plaster walls toward an opening at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open viewing platform overlooking misty valley

events.description: emerging from covered corridor onto open platform with valley view
misty valley landscape becomes visible beyond the platform railing

agents.ego_description: walking onto the platform and approaching the railing to view the scenery

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing at the railing looking at the misty view

entered.detail: open stone platform with wooden railings overlooking the valley
fog-covered landscape visible below the platform

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open viewing platform where several people stand at the railing admiring a misty valley view. The area is lit by platform lanterns and open to the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper temple stairway continuing the ascent

events.description: leaving the viewing platform to ascend the final set of stairs
character continues climbing the steeper upper stairway

agents.ego_description: climbing the final set of stairs away from the platform toward higher temple levels

entered.detail: steep stone stairs with wooden railings continuing upward
building with traditional green tiled roof visible on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the viewing platform and continues ascending a steep upper stairway flanked by red pillars. A traditional building with a green roof becomes visible on the right as the climb continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends from an open, moonlit mountain path into the sheltered corridors of a temple. It begins with the character climbing an outdoor stone staircase flanked by cherry blossom trees and glowing lanterns, passing a figure in yellow robes while approaching a massive red temple gate. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open night air to the structured enclosure of the gateway. The camera then follows the character through the gate and into a covered stairway, where the moonlit exterior gives way to a lantern-lit interior passage defined by red pillars and white plaster walls.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed intimacy of a temple corridor into an expansive night vista before ascending toward higher sanctuary structures. It begins by following the character through a narrow covered walkway lined with red pillars and glowing paper lanterns, moving past white plaster walls toward a distant opening. As the character emerges from the corridor, the space opens onto a wide viewing platform where figures gather at the railing to overlook a misty valley under the night sky. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the platform to climb a steep upper stairway flanked by red pillars, finally revealing a traditional green-roofed building on the right as the ascent continues.
